dimensions.name: Problem framing
dimensions.rationale: Decision, scope and non-goals are traceable through the verified stage package.

dimensions.name: Data contract
dimensions.rationale: The review boundary preserves the approved data contract and input checksums.

dimensions.name: Method and baseline
dimensions.rationale: The frozen baseline decision and threshold sensitivity are both explicit.

dimensions.name: Verification
dimensions.rationale: Clean-room, shadow, negative, sensitivity and claim checks passed independently.

dimensions.name: Delivery and handoff
dimensions.rationale: The reviewed boundary is reproducible, but final consumer handoff belongs to defense.

dimensions.name: Review and defense
dimensions.rationale: Review findings are closed with rerun evidence; live defense is still pending.
